tldr: Luke Lamperti opened the week with a reduced-bunch sprint win for EF Education-EasyPost ahead of Vito Braet and Orluis Aular — the American sprinter's first WorldTour stage win at 23.

narrative.headline: Lamperti the early surprise
narrative.body: 171.2 km hilly opener, controlled bunch finish in Carrières-sous-Poissy. EF Education's gamble on the young American sprinter paid out on day one.

gcImpact.headline: First leader's jersey to Lamperti
gcImpact.body: Stage 1 winner becomes the leader on time bonuses.
